metadata.description: Personal, hand-vetted collection of Claude skills. Every plugin here has passed static audit (audit_skill.py) and sandbox first-run (sandbox_skill.sh). Trusted source = white-list.

plugins.name: a11y-audit
plugins.description: Accessibility (WCAG 2.1/2.2) audit skill — vetted local copy. Replace this example with a real skill you've vetted, or point source at an upstream repo pinned by sha.
